name: RH
business: RH is a leading retailer and luxury lifestyle brand operating primarily in the home furnishings market. We offer merchandise assortments across a number of categories, including furniture, lighting, textiles, bathware, décor, outdoor and garden, and baby, child and teen furnishings. Our curated and fully integrated assortments are presented consistently across our sales channels, including our retail locations, websites and Sourcebooks.
sellsTo: large-scale luxury hospitality, commercial and residential development projects

exposures.sentence: RH is a leading retailer and luxury lifestyle brand operating primarily in the home furnishings market.
Externally, our strategy comes to life digitally through The World of RH, an online portal where customers can explore and be inspired by the depth and dimension of our brand.
Our business depends on consumer demand for our products and we target consumers of high-end home furnishings.
We manage the distribution and delivery of our products through our distribution centers.
We are currently developing RH Design Compounds in Naples and Miami, Florida and Walnut Creek, California.

Material damage to, or interruptions in, our information systems, including as a result of cybersecurity breaches or cyber fraud, could have a material adverse effect on our business or results of operations.

An introduction of new duties, tariffs, quotas or other similar trade restrictions, or increases in existing duties or tariff rates, on products imported into the United States, United Kingdom, Canada and Europe, whether actual, pending or threatened, may have a negative impact on our results of operations.

catalysts.event: Launch of RH Estates featuring RH Bespoke furniture and RH Couture upholstery
catalysts.sentence: which will continue with the spring 2026 launch of RH Estates, featuring RH Bespoke furniture and RH Couture upholstery.

catalysts.event: Opening of RH Milan, The Gallery on Corso Venezia
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to open RH Milan, The Gallery on Corso Venezia, and RH London, The Gallery in Mayfair

catalysts.event: Opening of RH London, The Gallery in Mayfair
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect to open RH Milan, The Gallery on Corso Venezia, and RH London, The Gallery in Mayfair

catalysts.event: Development of RH Design Compounds in Naples, Miami, and Walnut Creek
catalysts.sentence: We are currently developing RH Design Compounds in Naples and Miami, Florida and Walnut Creek, California.

tamClaims.claim: Total annual revenue opportunity of $5 to $6 billion from Design Galleries in the United States and Canada
tamClaims.sentence: We believe our strategy to open new Design Galleries in every major market in the United States and Canada will unlock the value of our vast assortment, generating an expected total annual revenue opportunity of $5 to $6 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Projected $20 to $25 billion global brand in terms of annual revenues
tamClaims.sentence: We believe that our luxury brand positioning and unique aesthetic have strong international appeal and that global expansion will provide RH with a substantial opportunity to build a projected $20 to $25 billion global brand in terms of annual revenues.

tamClaims.claim: $200 billion North American hotel industry opportunity for RH Guesthouses
tamClaims.sentence: Our hospitality efforts will continue to elevate the RH brand as we extend beyond the four walls of our Galleries into RH Guesthouses, where our goal is to create a new market for travelers seeking privacy and luxury in the $200 billion North American hotel industry.
